# Track reference type atom

**Data field**

A list of track reference type atoms containing the track reference information.

## Overview

For more information, see [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/quicktime-file-format/Track_reference_type_atom].

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this track reference atom.
- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
